---
title: Add Network to Your Wallet
description: >-
  Add Injective networks to your browser wallet in one click. Interactive
  wallet buttons for Injective EVM (MetaMask and other EVM wallets) and
  Injective native (Keplr, Leap), covering mainnet and testnet.
icon: wallet
updatedAt: "2026-07-13"
---

Add Injective to your browser wallet with a single click, or use the manual
configuration details below. Injective exposes two interoperable interfaces:

- **Injective EVM** is an Ethereum-compatible JSON-RPC layer. Use it with EVM
  wallets such as MetaMask, Rabby, or any injected `window.ethereum` wallet.
- **Injective (CosmWasm / native)** is the native Cosmos SDK chain. Use it with
  Cosmos wallets such as Keplr and Leap.

<Info>
Injective EVM and Injective native map to the same network. They use different
chain IDs but share the same underlying state. See
[Network Information](/developers/network-information) and
[EVM Network Information](/developers-evm/network-information) for the full reference.
</Info>

export const WALLET_LOGOS = {
  metamask: "data:image/svg+xml;base64,",
  keplr: "data:image/png;base64,",
  leap: "data:image/svg+xml;base64,",
  subwallet: "data:image/svg+xml;base64,",
};

export const AddNetworkCard = ({ kind }) => {
  const [status, setStatus] = useState({});
  const setBtn = (id, s) => setStatus((prev) => ({ ...prev, [id]: s }));

  const pickEvm = (flag) => {
    // SubWallet always exposes its EVM provider at window.SubWallet, and only
    // takes over window.ethereum when no other EVM wallet is present. Prefer the
    // dedicated global so the SubWallet button never falls back to MetaMask.
    if (flag === "isSubWallet" && window.SubWallet) return window.SubWallet;
    const eth = window.ethereum;
    if (!eth) return null;
    const list = eth.providers && eth.providers.length ? eth.providers : [eth];
    return list.find((p) => p && p[flag]) || eth;
  };

  const addEvm = async (flag, config) => {
    const provider = pickEvm(flag);
    if (!provider) {
      alert("Please install MetaMask or another EVM wallet.");
      throw new Error("no-evm-wallet");
    }
    try {
      await provider.request({
        method: "wallet_switchEthereumChain",
        params: [{ chainId: config.chainId }],
      });
    } catch (err) {
      // 4902 = network not added yet → add it.
      if (err && err.code === 4902) {
        try {
          await provider.request({
            method: "wallet_addEthereumChain",
            params: [config],
          });
        } catch (addError) {
          console.error("Failed to add Injective network:", addError);
          throw addError;
        }
      } else {
        console.error("Failed to switch to Injective:", err);
        throw err;
      }
    }
  };

  const cosmosProvider = (wallet) => {
    if (wallet === "keplr") return window.keplr;
    if (wallet === "leap") return window.leap;
    return null;
  };

  const enableCosmos = async (wallet, chainId) => {
    const provider = cosmosProvider(wallet);
    if (!provider) {
      alert("Please install the " + wallet + " wallet.");
      throw new Error("no-cosmos-wallet");
    }
    await provider.enable(chainId);
  };

  const run = async (id, fn) => {
    try {
      setBtn(id, "pending");
      await fn();
      setBtn(id, "done");
      setTimeout(() => setBtn(id, "idle"), 2500);
    } catch (e) {
      setBtn(id, "error");
      setTimeout(() => setBtn(id, "idle"), 3500);
    }
  };

  const evmMainnet = {
    chainId: "0x6f0",
    chainName: "Injective",
    rpcUrls: ["https://sentry.evm-rpc.injective.network/"],
    nativeCurrency: { name: "Injective", symbol: "INJ", decimals: 18 },
    blockExplorerUrls: ["https://blockscout.injective.network/"],
  };
  const evmTestnet = {
    chainId: "0x59f",
    chainName: "Injective Testnet",
    rpcUrls: ["https://k8s.testnet.json-rpc.injective.network/"],
    nativeCurrency: { name: "Injective", symbol: "INJ", decimals: 18 },
    blockExplorerUrls: ["https://testnet.blockscout.injective.network/"],
  };

  const config = {
    evm: {
      title: "Injective EVM",
      networks: [
        {
          name: "Mainnet",
          chainId: "1776",
          wallets: [
            { id: "evm-m-mm", name: "MetaMask", logo: WALLET_LOGOS.metamask, run: () => addEvm("isMetaMask", evmMainnet) },
            { id: "evm-m-sw", name: "SubWallet", logo: WALLET_LOGOS.subwallet, run: () => addEvm("isSubWallet", evmMainnet) },
          ],
        },
        {
          name: "Testnet",
          chainId: "1439",
          wallets: [
            { id: "evm-t-mm", name: "MetaMask", logo: WALLET_LOGOS.metamask, run: () => addEvm("isMetaMask", evmTestnet) },
            { id: "evm-t-sw", name: "SubWallet", logo: WALLET_LOGOS.subwallet, run: () => addEvm("isSubWallet", evmTestnet) },
          ],
        },
      ],
    },
    cosmos: {
      title: "Injective (CosmWasm / Native)",
      networks: [
        {
          name: "Mainnet",
          chainId: "injective-1",
          wallets: [
            { id: "cos-m-keplr", name: "Keplr", logo: WALLET_LOGOS.keplr, run: () => enableCosmos("keplr", "injective-1") },
            { id: "cos-m-leap", name: "Leap", logo: WALLET_LOGOS.leap, run: () => enableCosmos("leap", "injective-1") },
          ],
        },
        {
          name: "Testnet",
          chainId: "injective-888",
          wallets: [
            { id: "cos-t-keplr", name: "Keplr", logo: WALLET_LOGOS.keplr, run: () => enableCosmos("keplr", "injective-888") },
            { id: "cos-t-leap", name: "Leap", logo: WALLET_LOGOS.leap, run: () => enableCosmos("leap", "injective-888") },
          ],
        },
      ],
    },
  }[kind];

  return (
    <div className="not-prose" style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "14px", margin: "18px 0" }}>
      {config.networks.map((net) => (
        <div
          key={net.name}
          style={{
            border: "1px solid rgba(77,61,255,0.22)",
            borderRadius: "16px",
            padding: "16px 18px",
            background: "rgba(128,128,128,0.06)",
          }}
        >
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "baseline", justifyContent: "space-between", marginBottom: "12px" }}>
            <span style={{ fontWeight: 700, fontSize: "15px", color: "inherit" }}>
              {config.title} {net.name}
            </span>
            <span style={{ fontSize: "12.5px", opacity: 0.6, fontFamily: "monospace" }}>
              Chain ID {net.chainId}
            </span>
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexWrap: "wrap", gap: "10px" }}>
            {net.wallets.map((w) => {
              const s = status[w.id] || "idle";
              const text =
                s === "pending" ? "Confirm in wallet" :
                s === "done" ? "Added" :
                s === "error" ? "Try again" : w.name;
              return (
                <button
                  key={w.id}
                  type="button"
                  disabled={s === "pending"}
                  onClick={() => run(w.id, w.run)}
                  style={{
                    display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "9px",
                    padding: "9px 16px 9px 10px", borderRadius: "11px",
                    border: "1px solid rgba(128,128,128,0.28)",
                    background: s === "error" ? "rgba(255,0,0,0.08)" : s === "done" ? "rgba(0,200,0,0.08)" : "transparent",
                    color: "inherit", fontWeight: 600, fontSize: "14px",
                    cursor: s === "pending" ? "wait" : "pointer",
                    minWidth: "130px",
                  }}
                >
                  <img src={w.logo} alt={w.name} width="26" height="26" style={{ borderRadius: "7px", flexShrink: 0 }} />
                  <span>{text}</span>
                </button>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
};

## Injective EVM

Injective EVM works with EVM wallets like MetaMask and Rabby. Pick a network and
click your wallet. It will prompt you to add or switch to Injective.

<AddNetworkCard kind="evm" />

<Callout icon="info" color="#07C1FF" iconType="regular">
The button uses the standard `wallet_addEthereumChain` and
`wallet_switchEthereumChain` requests. If the network is already added, your
wallet shows a switch prompt instead. If nothing happens, add it manually with
the values below.
</Callout>

### Manual configuration

<Tabs>

<Tab title="Injective EVM Mainnet" icon="server">

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Network Name | Injective |
| Chain ID | `1776` |
| RPC URL | `https://sentry.evm-rpc.injective.network/` |
| WS Endpoint | `wss://sentry.evm-ws.injective.network` |
| Currency Symbol | `INJ` |
| Decimals | `18` |
| Block Explorer | `https://blockscout.injective.network/` |

</Tab>

<Tab title="Injective EVM Testnet" icon="flask-vial">

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Network Name | Injective Testnet |
| Chain ID | `1439` |
| RPC URL | `https://k8s.testnet.json-rpc.injective.network/` |
| WS Endpoint | `wss://k8s.testnet.ws.injective.network/` |
| Currency Symbol | `INJ` |
| Decimals | `18` |
| Block Explorer | `https://testnet.blockscout.injective.network/` |
| Faucet | [`testnet.faucet.injective.network`](https://testnet.faucet.injective.network/) |

</Tab>

</Tabs>

## Injective (CosmWasm / Native)

The native Injective chain works with Cosmos wallets like Keplr and Leap.
Injective ships built into both wallets, so it is available out of the box.
Pick a network and click your wallet to unlock the chain.

<AddNetworkCard kind="cosmos" />

<Callout icon="info" color="#07C1FF" iconType="regular">
Keplr and Leap include Injective by default, so the button simply unlocks the
chain in your wallet. For a full wallet integration guide, see
[Wallets](/defi/wallet/index).
</Callout>

### Manual configuration

<Tabs>

<Tab title="Injective Mainnet" icon="server">

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Chain ID | `injective-1` |
| RPC / Node | `https://sentry.tm.injective.network:443` |
| Currency Symbol | `INJ` |
| Decimals | `18` |
| Explorer | [`injscan.com`](https://injscan.com/) |

<Info>
Injective natively uses the chain ID `injective-1`. Its EVM interface uses the
numeric chain ID `1776`. Both map to the same mainnet.
</Info>

</Tab>

<Tab title="Injective Testnet" icon="flask-vial">

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Chain ID | `injective-888` |
| RPC / Node | `https://testnet.sentry.tm.injective.network:443` |
| Currency Symbol | `INJ` |
| Decimals | `18` |
| Explorer | [`testnet.explorer.injective.network`](https://testnet.explorer.injective.network/) |
| Faucet | [`testnet.faucet.injective.network`](https://testnet.faucet.injective.network/) |

<Info>
Injective natively uses the chain ID `injective-888` on testnet. Its EVM
interface uses the numeric chain ID `1439`. Both map to the same testnet.
</Info>

</Tab>

</Tabs>
